title: Looking for a Monday expert to set up our accounts
excerpt:
Hello, 
we’re an events company in the UK running several different brands. We’re looking to get set up on Monday to manage marketing check lists for hundreds of overlapping events along with things like admin, staying o…

posts.author: loulou (Louise Glover)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

we’re an events company in the UK running several different brands. We’re looking to get set up on Monday to manage marketing check lists for hundreds of overlapping events along with things like admin, staying on top of invoices, HR tasks, Logistics etc etc

We also have 2 other brands which are online retailers, so there’s basically a lot to manage and i need a bit of help setting up the functionality. I’ve tried with Monday before but i couldn’t figure it all out for how we work so would love to hire an expert to help get us set up and show me and my team how to use everything

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @loulou ,

I am an experienced certified monday.com professional having served the customers from almost all industrial verticals.

I would love to get in touch and know more about your requirement so that I can suggest you the best possible solution.

Please feel free to reach out at aquibcs@outlook.com

Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @loulou

Welcome to the community!

At upstream, we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation.

To schedule a meeting, you can reach me directly at peta@upstreamtech.io or book a meeting with us through the link provided below. We look forward to discussing your objectives and finding ways to help you achieve your goals.

Chat with Peta
International Client - Special Hours

Thank you for considering upstream as your partner, and have a great day ahead!

Kind regards,
Peta

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @loulou ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can without a doubt help you optimize your workflow and streamline your processes. We have a wealth of experience in helping companies follow an organized workflow, and we have worked together with many marketing and logistics clients, so we are well aware of monday and business best-practices regarding these fields.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements and see if we are the right fit for you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @loulou !

Welcome to the monday com community forum!

To manage marketing checklists, I would strongly recommend an event company to seek help from certified monday.com consultants before setting up your account on this robust Work OS. By seeking consultation from experts, you’ll get to know how you can stay on top of things like managing invoices, logistics, HR tasks, admin, and more.

Regards
